title: Hit Display
description: PvP HUD feedback mod with tons of customization!
body:
# Hit Display — Damage & Combo HUD
Activates on hit. Visualizes real-time damage, death, and combos.

# Commands:
### /hitdisplay trackhealth <true|false>
    Tracks entity heath and displays it below the damage you deal.
    
### /hitdisplay scale <value>
    Sets the HUD scale from 0.1 to 5.0.
    Customize how large the damage and combo text appears.

### /hitdisplay combo <true|false>
    Toggles combo counter display.
    When enabled, shows your current combo streak on hit.

### /hitdisplay mode <1-9>
    Choose your animation style:
    Each mode controls how the damage text animates.

### /hitdisplay color <name>
    Sets the text color.

### /hitdisplay move
    Enters drag-and-drop HUD positioning mode.
    Customize where the HUD appears on screen.
